sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8203" key="a)nelkto/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνελκτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n8203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">up-drawn,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. ὀφρύσι,</foreign> Prob. of Pericles, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:355" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">355</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
